case_title: DANIEL JORDAN VS. ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FRED VIVANCO, PROJECT ENGINEER. FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SRVICE FEE $40. SERVED FEB-10-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-18-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL JORDAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FRED VIVANCO (PROJECT ENGINEER) AND TAYLOR ESQUIVEL (SAFETY MANAGER). PARTIES CAME TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $84 TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WILL MAKE THE PAYMENT VIA CHECK TO THE MAILING ADDRESS WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS CONFIRMED. THE CASE IS SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO 4-18-23 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE IF PAYMENT IS SETTLED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,502.00 FILED BY JORDAN, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY JORDAN, DANIEL ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
